# ParamEncoding.SentinelEncode method

Wraps the UTF-8 Base64 of *text* in the sentinel form. (R-9.5.3-b, R-9.5.3-c)

```csharp
public static string SentinelEncode(string text)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| text | The text to encode. |

## Return Value

The `=?base64?{payload}?=` form.
